name: A Valentine's Date Night ❤️
description:
“No one should have to be alone on Valentine's Day. It's meant to be for spending time with those we love.”

❤️✨🥰🌹

Just wanted to wish everyone a happy Valentine's Day and loving February. ♥♥ I know not everyone appreciates Valentine's Day, but I think it is a perfect holiday for appreciating the love you have in your life; be it your partner, your friends, and/or your family. It isn't a day to be sad because you're single. It should be spent with those you love most.

Remember: It isn't to kiss the homies goodnight!

We love love here!

❤️✨🥰🌹

Enter (once more) Elena and Maribel: a very loving and open couple who both want to spend Valentines who they love most: each other and YOU!

While this can be a continuation of their Christmas bot, you do not have needed to write with that one to enjoy this one. It is similar base with Valentine's Day flavor.

If you established a relationship with them in the Christmas bot, feel free to add that into your chat history!

EDIT: It came to my attention that the bot was not reacting properly to the concept of having an established relationship, if established from the Christmas bot. I have attempted to fix this and it should work appropriately now.

There are now 2 Scenarios to assist in this.

1st Intro - Your two best friends have invited you over to spend Valentine's Day with them.
Relationship beyond friendship is not established, but could be.

2nd Intro - You accepted Mari and Eli's offer to join their relationship.
Spending this time with them is as normal as it is to breathe.

While romantic intimacy is the intent of this bot, Mari and Leni are also just as happy spending the day with you platonically.

The choice is yours! ♥

❤️✨🥰🌹

~*~THE LOVELY LADIES~*~
creator: Total Darkness
